doc: Library namespace for editor pane nodes.

children.doc: Library template node representing one item in the editor tree. Contains TreeItemRow and ExpandCollapseHolder.

Switchable container node for the row representation of a tree item. Has its own content area. Switches between ViewState (default) and EditState based on editor mode. Delegates setText, updateToggle, setPaddingLeft to both states.
View-mode row state. Contains NodeIcon and NodeLabel. NodeIcon is clickable for folders.
Icon reflecting node state: folder-open (has children, expanded), folder-closed (has children, collapsed), file (leaf). Updated via updateToggle().
Text label displaying the node type name. Updated via setText().

Switchable container node for the edit-mode row. Has its own content area. Switches between NormalState (default) and HoverState on hover enter/leave. Delegates setText, updateToggle, setPaddingLeft to both states.

Default edit-mode row. Children: DragHandle (non-root only), NodeIcon, NodeLabel. NodeIcon activates folders. On hover enter: switches parent to HoverState. Drag events are forwarded to ancestor TreeItem.
Drag handle affordance. Present only for non-root items.
Icon reflecting node state: folder-open, folder-closed, or file. Updated via updateToggle().
Text label displaying the node type name. Updated via setText().

Hover edit-mode row. Children: DragHandle (non-root only), NodeIcon, NodeLabel, AddBtn, DeleteBtn (non-root only). NodeIcon activates folders. On hover leave: switches parent to NormalState. Drag events are forwarded to ancestor TreeItem.
Drag handle affordance. Present only for non-root items.
Icon reflecting node state: folder-open, folder-closed, or file. Updated via updateToggle().
Text label displaying the node type name. Updated via setText().
Action control to add a new child node. Activation delegates _onAddClick() to ancestor TreeItem.
Action control to delete the current node. Present only for non-root items. Activation delegates _onDeleteClick() to ancestor TreeItem.
Switchable state holder owning the expanded/collapsed state of a tree item. First child = ExpandedState, second child = CollapsedState.

State node for expanded state. getView(): activates ChildrenList if destroyed and returns its view. onOpen()/onClose(): notify TreeItem; onClose() also deactivates ChildrenList after the previous view has been captured by the switcher.
Mutable container holding child TreeItem instances. Its view is exposed through ExpandedState.getView() and mounted by the parent switcher into ExpandCollapseHolder content.
Runtime child item created by ChildrenList from child data.
State node for collapsed state. Has no content of its own. Its activation means children are not materialized through the expanded branch.
